author: śyāmānanda dāsa
verses:
bhaja bhāi! caitanya nityānanda
ghucibe sakala jvālā pāibe ānanda

vadana bhariyā bhāi! bala haribola
āpane vaiṣṇavagaṇa dhari’ dibe kola

minati kariyā kahi śuna sarvajanā
vraje rādhā⋅kṛṣṇa⋅līlā karaha bhāvanā

emana janama bhāi! nā hoibe āra
śyāmānanda kahe, keha nahe āpanāra
en_translation:
O brother! Worship Lord Caitanya and Lord Nityānanda. All miseries will end, and you will attain supreme bliss.

O brother! With a full mouth, chant "Haribol!" The Vaiṣṇavas themselves will embrace you.

I humbly request, listen all people: Meditate upon the pastimes of Rādhā and Kṛṣṇa in Vraja.

O brother! Such a human birth will not come again. Śyāmānanda says: "No one in this world is truly your own."
